name: Efficient EEG Seizure Detection Using INT8 Quantization, Channel Pruning, and Spiking Neural Networks
summary: arXiv:2607.16296v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Continuous EEG monitoring for epilepsy is constrained by the limited power and memory budgets of wearable and implantable devices. Deep neural netw...
description: arXiv:2607.16296v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Continuous EEG monitoring for epilepsy is constrained by the limited power and memory budgets of wearable and implantable devices. Deep neural networks can detect seizures with high accuracy, but their computational cost and model size make them difficult to deploy on such platforms. In this work we use a single 1D CNN seizure detector on the CH...
author: Kartikey Ahlawat
